DA_RUN_ID 

LABEL: TAF Production Run Identifier (unique for each TAF run) 

DESCRIPTION: A unique identifier that identifies the TAF production run that produced the TAF. 

SHORT NAME: DA_RUN_ID 

LONG NAME: DA_RUN_ID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 11 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Numeric string (e.g., 4260) 

COMMENT: —
